setup.note: Splits are recomputed from observed feature counts per language using only the benchmark languages already present in gold_eval_2.
setup.caution: Because gold_eval_2 was built from top-50 and bottom-50 languages, the tertile split is relative to this benchmark subset rather than the full language inventory.

low_resource_robustness.summary_note: Gain is measured as focus-model minus strongest non-focus baseline within each group.

family.description: Glottolog family_name on low-resource benchmark languages.

macroarea.description: Primary macro-area derived from the first Glottolog macroareas entry to avoid double-counting languages.
